serverBehavior: server.cjs serves root app files and does not prefer stale dist/index.html
sql: No new SQL required. This is a UI/logic patch on top of existing marketplace_jobs and job_events.
latestImportantFixes: v4.0.41 adds Priority Response acceptance confirmation for agency admins
Priority Response acceptance checks online and available agency guard counts before locking the job
Agency Dashboard separates standard open jobs, priority open jobs, accepted jobs, online guards, available guards, and priority jobs needing assignment
Priority jobs accepted by an agency move the user into Agency Job Management for guard assignment
Platform Admin gets oversight warnings when priority jobs are accepted but have no guard assigned
Client dashboard can show waiting for agency acceptance / guard assignment for Priority Response
Pricing remains removed until the future marketplace pricing and platform fee build
